title: Finite Min-Cut Holographic Entanglement Entropy (A/4 normalized boundary capacity)
theorems: D0-GRAV-FINITE-HOLOGRAPHIC-001 — finite entanglement entropy is terminal-normalized min-cut / 4
D0-GRAV-FINITE-HOLOGRAPHIC-002 — A/4 denominator is terminal ABCD capacity
D0-GRAV-FINITE-HOLOGRAPHIC-NOGO-001 — volume entropy not equal to boundary cut capacity
book_update: Book 07: finite min-cut entropy added as boundary-capacity witness extension of holographic area.
